MEASURE_LOT_HISTORY_1PC.sqlServer:
WITH src AS (
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY
                MEASURE_DATA_KIND,
                PARTITION_M_KEY
        ) AS RowNo,
        MEASURE_DATA_KIND,
        TEST_PROCESS_NAME,
        LOT_NAME,
        MEASURE_START_DATE,
        MEASURE_END_DATE,
        PARTITION_M_KEY,
        [PROGRAM] AS PROGRAM,
        EQUIPMENT_ID,
        OPERATOR_NAME,
        DEVICE_TYPE,
        TEC_KIND,
        DEVTYPE_INFO,
        CHIP_COUNT,
        MS_EXIST,
        MARK_LOT_NAME,
        NOBIN_FLAG,
        ST_DATETIME
    FROM nikuser.MEASURE_LOT_HISTORY_1PC
    WHERE 1=1
        --{{where}}
)
SELECT TOP (@pageSize)
    RowNo,
    MEASURE_DATA_KIND,
    TEST_PROCESS_NAME,
    LOT_NAME,
    MEASURE_START_DATE,
    MEASURE_END_DATE,
    PARTITION_M_KEY,
    PROGRAM,
    EQUIPMENT_ID,
    OPERATOR_NAME,
    DEVICE_TYPE,
    TEC_KIND,
    DEVTYPE_INFO,
    CHIP_COUNT,
    MS_EXIST,
    MARK_LOT_NAME,
    NOBIN_FLAG,
    ST_DATETIME
FROM src
WHERE RowNo > @lastRowNo
ORDER BY RowNo;

MEASURE_LOT_DEVTYPE_1PC.sqlServer:
WITH src AS (
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LOT_NAME) AS RowNo,
        CONCAT(LOT_NAME, CHAR(9), COALESCE(MAX(DEVTYPE_INFO), '')) AS Value
    FROM nikuser.MEASURE_LOT_HISTORY_1PC
    WHERE 1=1
      AND LOT_NAME IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(value)) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@lotNamesCsv, ','))
    GROUP BY LOT_NAME
)
SELECT TOP (@pageSize)
    RowNo,
    Value
FROM src
WHERE RowNo > @lastRowNo
ORDER BY RowNo;
MEASURE_LOT_DEVTYPE_1PC.vertica:
WITH RECURSIVE lot_list(value, rest) AS (
    SELECT
        TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CAST(:lotNamesCsv AS VARCHAR), '^[^,]+')) AS value,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(CAST(:lotNamesCsv AS VARCHAR), '^[^,]+,?', '') AS rest
    WHERE CAST(:lotNamesCsv AS VARCHAR) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(:lotNamesCsv AS VARCHAR) <> ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(rest, '^[^,]+')) AS value,
        REGEXP_REPLACE(rest, '^[^,]+,?', '') AS rest
    FROM lot_list
    WHERE rest <> ''
)
SELECT t.RowNo,
       t.Value
FROM (
SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LOT_NAME) AS RowNo,
        (COALESCE(LOT_NAME,'') || CHR(9) || COALESCE(MAX(DEVTYPE_INFO), '')) AS Value
    FROM stg_measure.MEASURE_LOT_HISTORY_1PC
    WHERE 1=1
      AND LOT_NAME IN (SELECT value FROM lot_list)GROUP BY LOT_NAME
) t
WHERE t.RowNo > :lastRowNo
ORDER BY t.RowNo
LIMIT :pageSize;
